function.name: git_status
function.description: Shows the working tree status — staged, unstaged, and untracked changes, plus the current branch name.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir). Auto-detects by walking up from this path looking for .git.

function.name: git_diff
function.description: Shows the diff of unstaged changes. Set staged=true to show the diff of staged (index) changes instead.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir).

staged.description: Show staged diff (git diff --staged) instead of unstaged diff.

function.name: git_log
function.description: Shows recent commit history. Optionally filter to a specific file path.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir).

file.description: Optional file path to filter history to a specific file.

function.name: git_branch
function.description: Lists local branches. Set all=true to include remote-tracking branches.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir).

function.name: git_pull
function.description: Fetches and merges changes from the remote repository.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir).

branch.description: Branch to pull (defaults to current branch).

function.name: git_checkout
function.description: Switches to an existing branch. Use create=true to create a new branch first.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir).

branch.description: The branch name to switch to or create.

function.name: git_commit
function.description: Stages all changes and creates a commit. Permission-gated — the user will be prompted to approve.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir).

function.name: git_create_pr
function.description: Pushes the current branch to origin and creates a pull request on GitHub. The PR will be visible for you to review and merge.

path.description: Directory to search for a Git repo (defaults to home_dir).

branch.description: Branch to create the PR from (defaults to current branch).
